name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## ✨ Feature Request

Thanks for suggesting an improvement! Help us understand your idea and why it would be valuable.

---

### Description
**What feature would you like?** Give a clear, concise description.

<!-- Example: Support for exporting to glTF 2.1 format -->


---

### Motivation / Why?
**Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve?**

<!-- Example: 
Many modern 3D models use glTF 2.1 features. Adding support would:
- Enable visualization of newer content
- Improve compatibility with modern tools
- Align with Khronos standards
-->


---

### Use Cases
**How would you use this feature? Can you provide specific examples?**

<!-- Example:
I often work with models that use glTF 2.1 extensions like transmission
and volume rendering. Currently I have to convert them to older formats.
-->


---

### Proposed Solution (Optional)
**Do you have ideas on how to implement this?**

<!-- Example:
Add KHR_materials_transmission support by implementing the refraction
shader and updating the glTF loader to parse the extension data.
-->


---

### Alternatives Considered (Optional)
**Have you thought of other approaches?**

<!-- Example:
- Could use external converter tool (but less convenient)
- Could use different format altogether
- Could implement as a plugin system
-->


---

### Additional Context

**Any other relevant information?**

- Links to specifications or references
- Examples or mockups
- Similar features in other software
- Priority or urgency

<!-- Add any additional information here -->


---

### Before You Submit

- [ ] I've searched existing issues and this is a new request
- [ ] This aligns with the project's scope and vision
- [ ] I've checked if this is already planned or implemented

---

**Thank you for your suggestion!** 💡
